title: LEGO ǀ Marvel Spider-Man vs. Oscorp - Interactive Toy with a Motorbike, 8 Minifigures incl. Miles Morales & Green Goblin - Collectible Super Hero Gift for 10+ Year Old Boys & Fans - 76324
features: Spider-Man building toy for kids – Spider-Man vs. Oscorp is a fun LEGO Marvel building toy for 10+ year old boys, girls and fans of Super Hero action
Super Hero minifigures – The buildable set includes 8 LEGO Marvel minifigures: Spider-Man, Spider-Woman, Miles Morales, Eddie Brock, Ghost-Spider, Norman Osborn, Kraven the Hunter and Green Goblin
Multi-model city scene – The action takes place inside and outside 3 buildings: Miles Morales’s apartment above a jewellery shop; the Oscorp building; and Venom’s apartment above a newsagent
Realistic role play – The building set includes a motorbike toy, glider, weapons, relevant accessories in each room and transparent sticks so kids can position and pose characters with realistic ease

Gift idea for Spider-Man fans – This LEGO Marvel gift for 10+ year old boys and girls is a large, customisable treat for kids who enjoy Super Heroes, Marvel collectibles and play-and-display building models
Build together with friends and family – The LEGO Builder app offers a fun and collaborative experience, where you can share the fun of LEGO building
Buildable LEGO Marvel sets – The extensive range of LEGO Marvel build-and-play sets gives kids an ever-changing universe of hands-on Super Hero adventures
description: From the manufacturer Super Heroes battle in an epic street showdown This multi-model city scene is bursting with Super Hero action, iconic characters and famous locations. Authentic features, weapons and accessories Kids bring the action to life inside and outside Miles Morales’s apartment, the Oscorp building and Venom’s apartment. LEGO | Marvel Spider-Man vs. Oscorp Miles Morales’ apartment The web-slinging hero lives above a jewellery shop. The Oscorp building Home of the evil megacorporation Oscorp Industries. Venom’s apartment Alien symbiote Eddie Brock lives above a newsagent. Authentic accessories A motorbike, glider, weapons and more inspire role play. 8 LEGO | Marvel minifigures Spider-Man, Ghost-Spider, Miles Morales, Green Goblin and more. Position and pose characters Place characters with ease into realistic poses. Expand the fun Discover more imaginative Super Hero fun for kids among the extensive range of LEGO | Marvel building sets (sold separately).
